description: <a href> link annotations (/Annots with URI actions and in-document /Dest for #fragments) and the /Outlines bookmark tree built from h1-h3 headings. Dead fragments get no annotation; text-decoration:none removes the UA underline.
visual_assertions: Links render blue and underlined by default (UA link style).
The quiet link is blue but not underlined (text-decoration: none).
The brand link is red (author color overrides the UA blue).
Clicking a link opens its URI; #intro jumps to the first heading.
The bookmark panel shows Interactive Features > Link styling / Internal navigation > Fragments, then Outline Structure.
